ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Year the loan was originated */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the loan is expected to mature */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Initial amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "loan_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan status */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "co_borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-borrower */,
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collateral */,
  "initial_ltv" REAL /* Initial loan-to-value ratio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_status_id") REFERENCES loan_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_collateral_id FOREIGN KEY ("collateral_id") REFERENCES collateral ("collateral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the report */,
  "default_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the loan has defaulted */,
  "default_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator of default (0 or 1) */,
  "tob" INTEGER /* Time on books (number of months the loan has been active) */,
  "num_periods" INTEGER /* Number of periods the loan is expected to be active */,
  "surv_prob" REAL /* Survival probability of the loan */,
  "lag_surv" REAL /* Lagged survival probability */,
  "pd_marginal" REAL /* Marginal probability of default */,
  "current_ltv" REAL /* Current loan-to-value ratio */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current outstanding balance of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_performance_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lagged_performance" (
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lagged performance record */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "lag_surv" REAL /* Lagged survival probability */,
  "lag_pd" REAL /* Lagged probability of default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lagged_performance_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES loan_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "risk_weight" REAL /* Risk weight associated with the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security number of the borrower */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of collateral */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_loans" (
  "portfolio_loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-loan relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_loans_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_loans_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_economic_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the indicator's impact on the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_economic_links_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_economic_links_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
